reason: SC-85 cannot reach its ≥70% all-products origin_country fill-rate acceptance criterion with current persisted data. Backfill only parses product names because Product does not store description_html; direct origin_text normalization improved coverage from 546/891 to 561/891 (63%), but ~130 remaining null-origin rows are likely non-coffee merch/subscriptions and many other coffees need richer crawl text or a denominator change. Human decision needed: approve scope expansion (store descriptions / re-crawl / farm-name mapping), adjust the ticket acceptance criterion denominator, or pivot to SC-86.
resolution: human_approved: 63% fill rate accepted as done
